notes: An H suffix before the dash denotes a horizontal variant of the same base well name.
Well names are auto-detected from candidate files with well-like columns.
Coordinates use the instance engineering CRS when the instance manifest declares it; otherwise CRS is null.
map_hover_info, when present, mirrors the configured second hover box from the surface map well layer.
well_naming records selected-well name variations such as leading-zero spellings and horizontal H-suffix variants.
